name: Greenwave Technology Solutions, Inc.
summary: Overview We were formed on April 26, 2013 as a technology platform developer under the name MassRoots, Inc. In October 2021, we changed our corporate name from MassRoots, Inc. to Greenwave Technology Solutions, Inc. On September 30, 2021, we closed our acquisition of Empire Services, Inc. (Empire), which operates 13 metal recycling facilities in Virginia, North Carolina, and Ohio. The acquisition was effective October 1, 2021 upon the effectiveness of the Certificate of Merger in Virginia. Upon ...
